message:
Use version bump dropdown in release workflow

Replace manual version string input with a dropdown offering major,
minor, and patch options. The workflow now auto-computes the new
version from version.json, eliminating manual version entry errors.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,11 +3,14 @@ name: Release
 on:
   workflow_dispatch:
     inputs:
-      version:
-        description: |
-          Version identifier for the release (e.g., v5.3.0)
+      bump:
+        description: Version bump type
         required: true
-        type: string
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - minor
+          - patch
+          - major
       title:
         description: |
           Title of the release (e.g., "Tenzir Node v5.3.0")
@@ -75,12 +78,35 @@ jobs:
           git config --global user.name "tenzir-bot"
           git config --global user.email "engineering@tenzir.com"
 
-      - name: Validate version format
+      - name: Compute new version
+        id: version
         run: |
-          if [[ ! "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" =~ ^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(-.*)?$ ]]; then
-            echo "Error: Version must follow semver format (e.g., v1.2.3 or v1.2.3-beta1)"
-            exit 1
-          fi
+          # Read current version from version.json
+          CURRENT_VERSION=$(jq -r '.["tenzir-version"]' version.json)
+          echo "Current version: ${CURRENT_VERSION}"
+
+          # Parse version components
+          IFS='.' read -r MAJOR MINOR PATCH <<< "${CURRENT_VERSION}"
+
+          # Bump version based on input
+          case "${{ github.event.inputs.bump }}" in
+            major)
+              MAJOR=$((MAJOR + 1))
+              MINOR=0
+              PATCH=0
+              ;;
+            minor)
+              MINOR=$((MINOR + 1))
+              PATCH=0
+              ;;
+            patch)
+              PATCH=$((PATCH + 1))
+              ;;
+          esac
+
+          NEW_VERSION="v${MAJOR}.${MINOR}.${PATCH}"
+          echo "New version: ${NEW_VERSION}"
+          echo "version=${NEW_VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
 
       - name: Determine release type based on branch
         id: release_type
@@ -96,12 +122,12 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Check if release already exists
         run: |
-          if [ -d "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" ]; then
-            echo "Error: Release directory for ${{ github.event.inputs.version }} already exists"
+          if [ -d "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" ]; then
+            echo "Error: Release directory for ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} already exists"
             exit 1
           fi
-          if git tag -l | grep -q "^${{ github.event.inputs.version }}$"; then
-            echo "Error: Tag ${{ github.event.inputs.version }} already exists"
+          if git tag -l | grep -q "^${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}$"; then
+            echo "Error: Tag ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} already exists"
             exit 1
           fi
 
@@ -119,15 +145,15 @@ jobs:
           RELEASE_TITLE: ${{ github.event.inputs.title }}
           RELEASE_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.inputs.description }}
         run: |
-          uvx tenzir-changelog release create "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" \
+          uvx tenzir-changelog release create "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" \
             --title "$RELEASE_TITLE" \
             --intro "$RELEASE_DESCRIPTION" \
             --yes
 
       - name: Update version.json and Python package versions
         run: |
           # Extract version without 'v' prefix
-          VERSION_NUMBER=$(echo "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" | sed 's/^v//')
+          VERSION_NUMBER=$(echo "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" | sed 's/^v//')
 
           # Update tenzir-version in version.json using jq
           jq --arg version "${VERSION_NUMBER}" '.["tenzir-version"] = $version' version.json > version.json.tmp
@@ -150,15 +176,15 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Verify release was created
         run: |
-          if [ ! -d "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" ]; then
+          if [ ! -d "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" ]; then
             echo "Error: Release directory was not created"
             exit 1
           fi
           echo "Release created successfully:"
-          cat "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}/manifest.yaml"
+          cat "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/manifest.yaml"
           echo ""
           echo "Entries:"
-          ls -la "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}/entries/"
+          ls -la "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/entries/"
 
           echo ""
           echo "Updated version.json:"
@@ -176,20 +202,20 @@ jobs:
 
           # Commit changes
           git add --all
-          git commit -s -m "Release Tenzir Node ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
+          git commit -s -m "Release Tenzir Node ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
 
       - name: Create signed annotated tag
         env:
           TAG_TITLE: ${{ github.event.inputs.title }}
         run: |
-          git tag -a -s "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" \
-            -m "Tenzir Node ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}: $TAG_TITLE"
+          git tag -a -s "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" \
+            -m "Tenzir Node ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}: $TAG_TITLE"
 
       - name: Push changes and tag
         run: |
           CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
           git push origin "$CURRENT_BRANCH"
-          git push origin "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
+          git push origin "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
 
       - name: Generate SBOM artifact
         run: nix run .#generate-sbom -- /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json
@@ -201,18 +227,18 @@ jobs:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.generate_token.outputs.token }}
         run: |
           # Copy the entire release directory to temp
-          cp -r "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" "/tmp/release-dir"
+          cp -r "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" "/tmp/release-dir"
 
           # Switch to main branch
           git fetch origin main
           git checkout main
 
           # Copy the release directory
-          cp -r "/tmp/release-dir" "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
+          cp -r "/tmp/release-dir" "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
 
           # Commit to main
-          git add "changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
-          git commit -s -m "Add backport release Tenzir Node ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
+          git add "changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
+          git commit -s -m "Add backport release Tenzir Node ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
           git push origin main
 
       - name: Update latest branch
@@ -228,7 +254,7 @@ jobs:
           RELEASE_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.inputs.description }}
         run: |
           # Format version for changelog URL (replace dots with dashes, remove 'v' prefix)
-          VERSION_FOR_URL=$(echo "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" | sed 's/^v//' | sed 's/\./-/g')
+          VERSION_FOR_URL=$(echo "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" | sed 's/^v//' | sed 's/\./-/g')
           CHANGELOG_URL="https://docs.tenzir.com/changelog/node/v${VERSION_FOR_URL}/"
 
           # Create release notes file to handle special characters properly
@@ -242,28 +268,28 @@ jobs:
           sed -i "s|CHANGELOG_URL_PLACEHOLDER|${CHANGELOG_URL}|g" /tmp/release-notes.md
 
           # Create the release using the notes file
-          gh release create "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" \
+          gh release create "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" \
             --title "$RELEASE_TITLE" \
             --notes-file /tmp/release-notes.md \
             ${{ steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'true' && '--latest' || '--latest=false' }}
 
       - name: Attach SBOM to release
         env:
           GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.generate_token.outputs.token }}
-        run: gh release upload "${{ github.event.inputs.version }}" /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json --clobber
+        run: gh release upload "${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json --clobber
 
       - name: Output success message (latest release)
         if: steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'true'
         run: |
-          echo "🎉 Release ${{ github.event.inputs.version }} created successfully!"
-          echo "📁 Release directory: changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}/"
-          echo "🏷️ Tag: ${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
+          echo "🎉 Release ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} created successfully!"
+          echo "📁 Release directory: changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/"
+          echo "🏷️ Tag: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
           echo "🌿 Latest branch updated"
-          echo "📋 GitHub release: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tag/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}"
+          echo "📋 GitHub release: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tag/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
 
       - name: Output success message (non-latest release)
         if: steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'false'
         run: |
-          echo "🎉 Release ${{ github.event.inputs.version }} created successfully!"
-          echo "📁 Release directory: changelog/releases/${{ github.event.inputs.version }}/"
+          echo "🎉 Release ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} created successfully!"
+          echo "📁 Release directory: changelog/releases/${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/"
           echo "📋 Release copied to main branch"
